T0076.title: Niche Data
T0076.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to personal or corporate information with low market demand that is difficult to monetize.
T0076.description: This data may be of little interest to underground practitioners due to the target group's weak purchasing power, outdated information, or narrow application scenarios. Such data is often sold off cheaply in bulk or bundled with other high-value data, used to fill databases or for low-cost, wide-net scams.
